title: bonafousia angulata
intro: Bonafousia angulata, also known as the Indian oak tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Bonafousia angulata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anticancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts that can be used to treat various health conditions.
